text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after El Condor Pasa has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whaaam!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! It's finally time! After all this waiting, it's
finally here!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've finally finished my eternal fight,
we're going to the golden city of El Dorado!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Did you forget about the promise
you made back when we won the raffle?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! A hot spring vacation coupon?! Whoa...
this is a huge win!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's go once everything's calmed down
after the Twinkle Series and we have some time
on our hands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Which would be right now! If we let this chance
pass us by, when else could we possibly go?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wanna give you a nice, relaxing hot spring
break!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, maybe the real reason is a liiiittle different.
I just really, really wanna hang out with you,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's not a little different, it's completely different. But still, a promise is a promise.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, it's time to go soak
ourselves in the golden waters of the hot springs!
Let's find the golden monkey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was sure this would turn out to be a hectic trip
without a moment to rest, but actually...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, Trainer! This is really bad...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's me! And I messed up big time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I went into the hot spring with my mask on, and
now it's soaked!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I don't think I can put it back on until it dries...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So I came to your room so we could hang out
until then! With my real face!
choice_data_list: Why don't you hang out in your own room?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well... that's gonna be a no from me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I came on this trip to talk to you, after all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm a little embarrassed to be here as
just plain unmasked El, I still mean to make good
on that plan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I end up spending time with a
maskless El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is a little strange. At first I was a little
anxious, but now...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I feel pretty comfortable. Almost like I'm... home.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Do you want some tea, Trainer? Also, can you
gimme... I mean, can I have one of those candies?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, this is bad! I worked hard on my character
development...
choice_data_list: You don't have to push yourself so much.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but...
choice_data_list:
You went through all this trouble to come here
and relax, after all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's true... And I took off my mask too...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Maybe I don't need to be so tense. Um...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
When I'm with my mama and papa, I'm not always
so loud...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I settle down and let them baby me a
little. Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Is it okay if I hang out with you like that
sometimes?
choice_data_list: Of course. Let's get lost in conversation!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Just like when I was little!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El and I speak for a long time, much more freely
and easily than usual.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! This has been so much fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ojalá pudiera ser siempre así. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: N-nothing! Anyway...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I think my mask should be done drying for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We continue to talk for hours and lose track of
time. The food is delicious, and her unmasked
smiling face seems more innocent than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that El Condor Pasa and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
